tasks.task: Create workspace/sftp_client.py with an SFTPClient class that imports paramiko and uses SFTPConfig from sftp_config.py for connection settings
Implement a connect() method in SFTPClient that establishes an SSH/SFTP connection to the local SFTP server using paramiko with proper error handling
Implement a disconnect() method in SFTPClient to close the SFTP and SSH connections gracefully
Implement an upload_file(local_path, remote_path) method in SFTPClient that uploads a local file to the SFTP server with error handling
Add a context manager (__enter__/__exit__) to SFTPClient so connections are automatically opened and closed
Create workspace/test_sftp_client.py with unit tests for connect, disconnect, and upload_file using unittest.mock to mock paramiko calls
